description: Payment card management and recurring subscription tracking. Cards store bank, last four digits, and type. Subscriptions link to cards with title, amount, renewal day, and active status. Cards with active subscriptions cannot be deleted. Subscriptions grouped by card in accordion view.

subDeliverables.title: Cards CRUD
subDeliverables.description: Full CRUD for payment cards with fields: bank name, last four digits, and type (credit/debit). Auto-generated label combines all fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Create card with bank, last 4 digits, and type

subDeliverables.title: Subscriptions CRUD
subDeliverables.description: Full CRUD for recurring subscriptions with fields: title, amount, renewal day of month, card assignment, and active/inactive status.
acceptanceCriteria: Create subscription with title, amount, renewal day, and card
Sort by renewal day or title

subDeliverables.title: Subscriptions grouped by card in accordion
subDeliverables.description: Subscriptions organized by their assigned card using Accordion component, with each card as a collapsible section.
acceptanceCriteria: Accordion sections for each card with subscriptions

subDeliverables.title: Active/inactive toggle for subscriptions
subDeliverables.description: Toggle switch to mark subscriptions as active or inactive. Inactive subscriptions excluded from monthly total calculations.
acceptanceCriteria: Visual distinction between active and inactive

subDeliverables.title: Card deletion protection
subDeliverables.description: Prevent deletion of cards that have active subscriptions assigned to them. Show warning message explaining why deletion is blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Delete blocked if card has active subscriptions
Cards with no subscriptions can be deleted normally

subDeliverables.title: Active monthly total calculation
subDeliverables.description: Display total monthly cost of all active subscriptions as a summary figure at the top of the subscriptions page.
acceptanceCriteria: Total sums all active subscription amounts
Updates when subscriptions are toggled active/inactive
